title: Transform tools: crop UI, resize, skew

tasks.title: Crop mode: dimmed surround, thirds grid, handles, aspect locks, ⏎/⎋
tasks.notes: Core: Crop + CropAspect in PhotonzCore/Crop.swift (19 tests) — fitted/resize/moved/dragRect/thirdsLines, all aspect-locked and canvas-clamped. UI: crop tool enabled (C), full-canvas default rect, marquee selection seeds the rect, handles resize (8pt screen tolerance), inside drag moves, outside drag defines fresh rect, double-click or ⏎ commits (pixel-aligned, one undo step), ⎋ cancels drag then mode. Toolbar shows aspect capsules + ✓/✕ in crop mode (labels need .fixedSize() or SwiftUI collapses them). Chrome: even-odd dim layer, thirds grid, white border, square handles. Verified with in-process harness /tmp/photonz-crop-harness (41 checks, PNGs reviewed). Gotcha: #expect(optional == 4.0/3.0) misreports with bare literal division — use typed constants in tests.

tasks.title: Resize dialog: px/percent, aspect lock, presets, Retina @2x→@1x
Skew/rotate UI on selection handles (⌥-drag corners skews, rotate knob)
Canvas-size tool (expand canvas without scaling content, anchor picker)
